style_summary: Compare average or instantaneous rates from graphs, tables, or contexts; distinguish value from rate of change.
wording_patterns: at which is the rate of change the least
what is the average rate of change over the closed interval
on which intervals is the rate of change decreasing
which container would the graph be appropriate
notes: Mock items 7, 16, 76, 78, 82; alias: limits, rates-of-change, linear-functions.
